name: redcumbre-nexus
description: Cyberpunk command center for REDCUMBRE — neon-lit operations hub where AI agents work as digital operatives managing a multi-tenant SaaS empire. Dark industrial base with magenta/cyan neon accents, holographic displays, server racks, and a rain-streaked city skyline view.

textures.prompt: straight top-down bird's eye view, seamless texture of dark matte black floor with faint embedded circuit board traces glowing cyan, subtle hexagonal grid pattern, cyberpunk, industrial, minimal glow
straight top-down bird's eye view, seamless texture of dark floor tile with bright magenta neon strip running through center, cyberpunk aesthetic, dark concrete with glowing accent line
straight top-down bird's eye view, seamless texture of dark brushed steel wall panel with subtle rivets, faint cyan LED strip at bottom edge, industrial cyberpunk, matte dark grey-black
